message:
refactor(abi): migrate more openat/ftruncate/write/close to native syscalls

Replace libc::syscall with frankenlibc_core::syscall wrappers:
- pututxline: sys_openat
- updwtmp: sys_openat, sys_write, sys_close
- sem_open: sys_openat, sys_ftruncate

Reduces libc::syscall calls from 98 to 92.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
